title: TranscriptSegment
description: One transcribed utterance produced by the STT service. Timestamps are seconds relative to meeting start.

t_start.description: Segment start, seconds since meeting start.

t_end.description: Segment end, seconds since meeting start. Must be >= t_start.

text.description: Transcribed text. Arabic with English technical terms preserved in Latin script.

lang_detected.description: Language code detected by the transcriber, e.g. 'ar' or 'en'. 'unknown' when auto-detect was inconclusive.

avg_logprob.description: Average token log-probability reported by faster-whisper for this segment.
